title: Draft delegation protocol
content: Draft triage workflow, routing rules, escalation paths. Align with HEARTBEAT and SOUL; define event types and when to escalate.

title: Design delegation dashboard (optional)
content: If applicable, design a lightweight dashboard for task delegation status accessible to execs.

title: Assess need for dedicated delegation agent
content: Evaluate whether a dedicated agent (paperclip-create-agent) is needed to manage delegation tasks and routing.
